challenge.title: Ažuriranje zaliha
challenge.description: Uporedite i ažurirajte zalihe skladištene u 2D nizu podataka u odnosu na drugi 2D niz novog snabdevanja. Ažurirajte količine trenutnih artikala (u arr1). Ako artikal ne postoji, dodajte novi artikal sa njegovom količinom u niz zaliha. Vraćeni niz zaliha treba da bude sortiran abecedno po nazivima artikala.

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: updateInventory([[21, "Bowling Ball"], [2, "Dirty Sock"], [1, "Hair Pin"], [5, "Microphone"]], [[2, "Hair Pin"], [3, "Half-Eaten Apple"], [67, "Bowling Ball"], [7, "Toothpaste"]]) treba da vrati niz dužine 6.
tests.testString:
assert.equal(
  updateInventory(
    [
      [21, 'Bowling Ball'],
      [2, 'Dirty Sock'],
      [1, 'Hair Pin'],
      [5, 'Microphone']
    ],
    [
      [2, 'Hair Pin'],
      [3, 'Half-Eaten Apple'],
      [67, 'Bowling Ball'],
      [7, 'Toothpaste']
    ]
  ).length,
  6
);

tests.text: updateInventory([[21, "Bowling Ball"], [2, "Dirty Sock"], [1, "Hair Pin"], [5, "Microphone"]], [[2, "Hair Pin"], [3, "Half-Eaten Apple"], [67, "Bowling Ball"], [7, "Toothpaste"]]) inapaswa kurudisha [[88, "Bowling Ball"], [2, "Dirty Sock"], [3, "Hair Pin"], [3, "Half-Eaten Apple"], [5, "Microphone"], [7, "Toothpaste"]].
tests.testString:
assert.deepEqual(
  updateInventory(
    [
      [21, 'Bowling Ball'],
      [2, 'Dirty Sock'],
      [1, 'Hair Pin'],
      [5, 'Microphone']
    ],
    [
      [2, 'Hair Pin'],
      [3, 'Half-Eaten Apple'],
      [67, 'Bowling Ball'],
      [7, 'Toothpaste']
    ]
  ),
  [
    [88, 'Bowling Ball'],
    [2, 'Dirty Sock'],
    [3, 'Hair Pin'],
    [3, 'Half-Eaten Apple'],
    [5, 'Microphone'],
    [7, 'Toothpaste']
  ]
);

tests.text: updateInventory([[21, "Bowling Ball"], [2, "Dirty Sock"], [1, "Hair Pin"], [5, "Microphone"]], []) inapaswa kurudisha [[21, "Bowling Ball"], [2, "Dirty Sock"], [1, "Hair Pin"], [5, "Microphone"]].
tests.testString:
assert.deepEqual(
  updateInventory(
    [
      [21, 'Bowling Ball'],
      [2, 'Dirty Sock'],
      [1, 'Hair Pin'],
      [5, 'Microphone']
    ],
    []
  ),
  [
    [21, 'Bowling Ball'],
    [2, 'Dirty Sock'],
    [1, 'Hair Pin'],
    [5, 'Microphone']
  ]
);

tests.text: updateInventory([], [[2, "Hair Pin"], [3, "Half-Eaten Apple"], [67, "Bowling Ball"], [7, "Toothpaste"]]) inapaswa kurudisha [[67, "Bowling Ball"], [2, "Hair Pin"], [3, "Half-Eaten Apple"], [7, "Toothpaste"]].
tests.testString:
assert.deepEqual(
  updateInventory(
    [],
    [
      [2, 'Hair Pin'],
      [3, 'Half-Eaten Apple'],
      [67, 'Bowling Ball'],
      [7, 'Toothpaste']
    ]
  ),
  [
    [67, 'Bowling Ball'],
    [2, 'Hair Pin'],
    [3, 'Half-Eaten Apple'],
    [7, 'Toothpaste']
  ]
);

tests.text: updateInventory([[0, "Bowling Ball"], [0, "Dirty Sock"], [0, "Hair Pin"], [0, "Microphone"]], [[1, "Hair Pin"], [1, "Half-Eaten Apple"], [1, "Bowling Ball"], [1, "Toothpaste"]]) inapaswa kurudisha [[1, "Bowling Ball"], [0, "Dirty Sock"], [1, "Hair Pin"], [1, "Half-Eaten Apple"], [0, "Microphone"], [1, "Toothpaste"]].
tests.testString:
assert.deepEqual(
  updateInventory(
    [
      [0, 'Bowling Ball'],
      [0, 'Dirty Sock'],
      [0, 'Hair Pin'],
      [0, 'Microphone']
    ],
    [
      [1, 'Hair Pin'],
      [1, 'Half-Eaten Apple'],
      [1, 'Bowling Ball'],
      [1, 'Toothpaste']
    ]
  ),
  [
    [1, 'Bowling Ball'],
    [0, 'Dirty Sock'],
    [1, 'Hair Pin'],
    [1, 'Half-Eaten Apple'],
    [0, 'Microphone'],
    [1, 'Toothpaste']
  ]
);
